title: Xtra Buttery Canadian Bread Casserole
description: A buttery, crumbly, and light Canadian dish featuring tomato juice and double-rise bread, perfect for a low-carb friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large kazan cauldron, combine the cubed bread, melted butter, tomato juice, shredded cheese, diced ham, chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper.
Mix all the ingredients together until the bread is well coated.
Cover the kazan cauldron with a lid and let it sit for 10 minutes to allow the bread to absorb the liquid.
Remove the lid and bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole hot and enjoy.
Garnish with additional chopped parsley if desired.
